data.name: AboutHolos
data.value: HOLOS - a tool to estimate and reduce greenhouse gas emissions from farms

data.name: DisclaimerText
data.value:
Important Notices
This software was designed primarily to encourage users to explore possible ways of reducing greenhouse gas emissions from farms. The estimates of emission are approximate, and may change appreciably as new scientific findings emerge. Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada does not warrant the reliability of this tool for uses other than education or exploratory gaming of possible practices.
Copyright/Permission to Reproduce
Material in this software were produced and/or compiled by Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada for the purpose of providing Canadians with information on greenhouse gas emissions from Canadian farms.
The material in this software is covered by the provisions of the Copyright Act, by Canadian laws, policies, regulations and international agreements. Such provisions serve to identify the information source and, in specific instances, to prohibit reproduction of materials without written permission.
Non-commercial Reproduction
Information in this software has been posted with the intent that it be readily available for personal and public non-commercial use and may be reproduced, in part or in whole and by any means, without charge or further permission from Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada. We ask only that:
- Users exercise due diligence in ensuring the accuracy of the materials reproduced; - Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada be identified as the source department; and, - The reproduction is not represented as an official version of the materials reproduced, nor as having been made, in affiliation with or with the endorsement of Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada.
Commercial Reproduction
Reproduction of multiple copies of material in this software, in whole or in part, for the purposes of commercial redistribution is prohibited except with written permission from the Government of Canada's copyright administrator, Communication Canada. Through the permission granting process, Communication Canada helps ensure individuals/organizations wishing to reproduce Government of Canada materials for commercial purposes have access to the most accurate, up-to-date versions. To obtain permission to reproduce materials on this CD for commercial purposes, please go to Communication Canada's "Applying for Copyright Clearance on Government of Canada Works" page.
Communication Canada Canadian Government Publishing Directorate Constitution Square Building, 4th Floor, 350 Albert Street Ottawa, Ontario Canada K1A 1M4
or
copyright.droitdauteur@communication.gc.ca
may be directed to the Privacy Co-ordinator by e-mail to holos@agr.gc.ca or by writing to:
Danielle Jacques Acting Access to Information and Privacy Coordinator Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada 930 Carling Avenue, Room 282 Sir John Carling Building Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0C5
If you are not satisfied with our response to your privacy concern, you may wish to contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner.

data.name: ToBeKeptInformed
data.value: To be kept informed about future versions, please send your contact information (including email address) to holos@agr.gc.ca

data.name: Column_AboveGroundCStocksPerTree
data.value: Above Ground C Stocks Per Tree

data.name: Column_AmmoniaEmissionFactorForManureStorage
data.value: Ammonia Emission Factor For Manure Storage

data.name: Column_BelowGroundCStocksPerTree
data.value: Below Ground C Stocks Per Tree

data.name: Column_SizeOfFirstRotationForField
data.value: Size Of First Rotation For Field

data.name: Column_TotalCarbonKilogramsDryMatterForBedding
data.value: Total Carbon Kilograms Dry Matter For Bedding

data.name: Column_TotalNitrogenInputsForIpccTier2
data.value: Total Nitrogen Inputs For Ipcc Tier 2

data.name: Column_TotalNitrogenKilogramsDryMatterForBedding
data.value: Total Nitrogen Kilograms Dry Matter For Bedding

data.name: Error_CannotWriteToNetworkDrive
data.value: Cannot write files to network drive: {0}

data.name: Error_DirectoryNotFound
data.value: Have you correctly inputed the path to the directory correctly?: {0}

data.name: Error_DuplicateAnimalGroupTypes
data.value: There should be one Group Type associated with each Group (Component Group Name). The Group Types: {0} refer to the same Group called {1}. The error can be found in the file at {2}

data.name: Error_EmptyDataInput
data.value: There is an empty data value at Row: {0}, Column: {1} in {2}.

data.name: Error_ExitAndRunHolosForFarmLocation
data.value: 1. Exit and run Holos to determine your Farm's location

data.name: Error_FarmDoesNotContainAnyData
data.value: The Farm: {0} does not contain any data for the Components. Therefore, there is no data to process!

data.name: Error_InvalidBaseDirectory
data.value: We cannot find the directory at {0}.

data.name: Error_InvalidComponentDirectoryName
data.value: The following Component Directory is invalid: {0} in the Farm: {1} and will not be processed.

data.name: Error_InvalidCoverCropTerminationType
data.value: {0} is not a valid CoverCropTerminationType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidCoverCropType
data.value: {0} is not a valid CoverCropType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidCropType
data.value: {0} is not a valid CropType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidDataInput
data.value: There is an invalid data input at Row: {0}, Column: {1}, at the location: {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidDate
data.value: {0} is not a valid Date. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidDiet
data.value: {0} is not a valid Diet. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidDietAdditiveType
data.value: {0} is not a valid DietAdditiveType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidDirectory
data.value: The directory at {0} cannot be found.

data.name: Error_InvalidHardinessZone
data.value: {0} is not a valid HardinessZone. The error is found at Row: {1}, Column {2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidHarvestMethod
data.value: {0} is not a valid HarvestMethod. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidHousingType
data.value: {0} is not a valid Housing Type. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidIrrigationType
data.value: {0} is not a valid IrrigationType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidManureAnimalSourceType
data.value: {0} is not a valid ManureAnimalSourceType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidManureApplicationType
data.value: {0} is not a valid ManureApplicationType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidManureLocationSourceType
data.value: {0} is not a valid ManureLocationSourceType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidManureManagement
data.value: {0} is not a valid Manure Management Type. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidManureStateType
data.value: {0} is not a valid ManureStateType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidPropertyName
data.value: Have you recently changed the name of one of the properties in the component at Row: {0} Column: {1} in {2}?

data.name: Error_InvalidResponse
data.value: {0} is not a valid Response. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidSettingsFilePath
data.value: The path to the settings file cannot be found.

data.name: Error_InvalidTillageType
data.value: {0} is not a valid TillageType. The error is found at Row:{1}, Column:{2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_InvalidTreeSpecies
data.value: {0} is not a valid Tree Species. The error is found at Row: {1}, Column {2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_LanguageNotSupported
data.value: The Language {0} is not supported by the Holos Command Line Interface. Please change the language on your operating system to either French (Canada) or English (Canada)

data.name: Error_NegativeInteger
data.value: {0} is not a valid data input. The error is found at Row: {1}, Column {2} in {3}.

data.name: Error_NoFarmsToProcess
data.value: There are no Farms that can be processed. Please create data input files for your Farms. Please press enter to exit

data.name: Error_NoFileData
data.value: The following file does not have any data to parse: {0}.

data.name: Error_NotAValidPolygonID
data.value: {0} is not a valid Polygon ID

data.name: Error_SameName
data.value: ComponentsWithTheSameNameError: The following {0} file does not have a unique Component name: {1}. The name that is in conflict is {2}, please change the appropriate column that refers to the Components name in the mentioned file to be unique.

data.name: Error_SameNameMessage
data.value: There are {0} {1} Components that have the same name in their data input files. Please change the files mentioned in the CLI to have unique names.

data.name: Label_CreateDefaultLethbridgeSettingsFile
data.value: 3. Create a settings file for your Farm based on the data corresponding to the Lethbridge, Alberta location.

data.name: Label_CreateSettingsFileBasedOnPolygon
data.value: 2. You know your Polygon ID and would like to create a settings file based on your location

data.name: Label_RemoveSelected
data.comment: GUI (H.Avalonia) - button to remove the currently selected management period

data.name: Label_AddIngredientToDiet
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: button to add an ingredient from the library to the selected diet

data.name: Label_SearchIngredientsWatermark
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: watermark/placeholder for the ingredient search TextBox in Step 2

data.name: Label_RemoveIngredientFromDiet
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: button to remove an ingredient from the selected diet

data.name: Label_DietTotals
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: live nutrient totals panel header

data.name: Label_TotalPercentageInDiet
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: validation banner label

data.name: Warning_PercentageSumNot100
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: warning shown when ingredient percentages don't sum to 100

data.name: Label_Origin
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: column header showing whether a diet is custom or default

data.name: Label_CustomDiet
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: badge shown for user-created custom diets

data.name: Label_SaveAsCustom
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: button to save the working diet as a new custom diet on the farm

data.name: Label_NewDietName
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: label next to the inline name prompt for Save As Custom

data.name: Label_NewDietNameWatermark
data.value: Enter a name for your custom diet
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: placeholder text in the Save As Custom name input

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep1
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: step header above the diets list

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep1Description
data.value: Pick an existing diet to edit, or click "Save As Custom…" below to start a new custom diet.
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: instructional text for step 1

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep2
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: step header above the available ingredients

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep2Description
data.value: Add ingredients to your diet by selecting one and clicking "+ Add to Diet".
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: instructional text for step 2

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep3
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: step header above the selected diet ingredients

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep3GuidanceUnder
data.value: Adjust the "% in Diet" values so the total of all ingredients equals 100%.
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: step 3 guidance shown when ingredient percentages sum to less than 100

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep3GuidanceOver
data.value: Total percentage exceeds 100% — lower the values so the total equals 100%.
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: step 3 guidance shown when ingredient percentages sum to more than 100

data.name: Label_DietFormulatorStep3GuidanceComplete
data.comment: GUI - Diet Formulator: step 3 guidance shown when ingredient percentages sum to exactly 100

data.name: Label_EmissionFactorForLeachingAndRunoff
data.value: Emission factor for leaching and runoff

data.name: Label_RotationStartYear
data.value: What year does this rotation start?
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 1 start year input label

data.name: Label_RotationEndYear
data.value: What year does this rotation end?
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 1 end year input label

data.name: Label_ExportFileWarning
data.value: Exported files can only be imported in v5. Files exported from v5 are not compatable in v4

data.name: Label_ListOfValidDirectories
data.value: Please make sure that the directories listed above are spelled correctly according to the list of valid Component Directory names below:

data.name: Label_MultipleSelection
data.value: Press CTRl+Click or SHIFT+Click for multiple selection

data.name: Label_ProductReturnedToSoilForAnnuals
data.value: Product returned to soil for annuals

data.name: Label_ProductReturnedToSoilForFodderCorn
data.value: Product returned to soil for fodder corn

data.name: Label_ProductReturnedToSoilForPerennials
data.value: Product returned to soil for perennials

data.name: Label_ProductReturnedToSoilForRootCrops
data.value: Product returned to soil for root crops

data.name: Label_RootsReturnedToSoilForAnnuals
data.value: Roots returned to soil for annuals

data.name: Label_RootsReturnedToSoilForFodderCorn
data.value: Roots returned to soil for fodder corn

data.name: Label_RootsReturnedToSoilForPerennials
data.value: Roots returned to soil for perennials

data.name: Label_Step1Text
data.value: Define the animal groups for this component

data.name: Label_Step2Text
data.value: Define the management periods for the selected animal group

data.name: Label_Step3Text
data.value: Define the management of this group of animals during the selected period of time

data.name: Label_StrawReturnedToSoilForAnnuals
data.value: Straw returned to soil for annuals

data.name: Label_StrawReturnedToSoilForRootCrops
data.value: Straw returned to soil for root crops

data.name: Label_WhatIsThePathToExportedFarms
data.value: What is the full directory path to your exported farms?

data.name: Label_WouldYouLikeToImportFarmsFromGui
data.value: Do you have farms that you would like to import from the Holos GUI?

data.name: Label_WouldYouLikeToOpenAnExistingFarmOrCreateANewOne
data.value: Would you like to open an existing farm or create a new one?

data.name: Message_AnimalGeneralTab
data.value: Basic information about this group of animals can be entered here. Values entered here will apply to the animals during the selected management period.

data.name: Message_AnimalHousingTab
data.value: Animal housing details can be entered on this tab. If animals are to be placed on a pasture, ensure at least one field component has been added to the farm and then set the 'Housing type' to pasture. You can then specify which pasture the animals are to be placed.

data.name: Message_AnimalManureTab
data.value: Manure handling system details can be entered on this tab. To adjust optional manure handling system information, click the 'Show Additional Information' button.

data.name: Message_DataInputMistakeData
data.value: There is a data input mistake at Row: {0} , Column: {1}. at the location: {2}.

data.name: Message_DataInputMistakeHeader
data.value: There is an input mistake with the header at Row: {0} in {1}. The header should be: {2}.

data.name: Message_DataMissingOptionalHeader
data.value: An optional header named "{0}" is missing. Holos will use a default value in {1}

data.name: Message_DefaultBeddingComposition
data.value: Default composition of bedding materials for beef and dairy cattle, swine, and poultry

data.name: Message_EmptyAddress
data.value: Address field is empty. Please try again.

data.name: Message_IncorrectAddress
data.value: The address entered was incorrect. Please try again.

data.name: Message_IncorrectLocationSelected
data.value: Cannot find the address for this coordinate. Please select a valid location.

data.name: Message_InitialAfterInstallation
data.value: Holos has created a template farm folder with the sample directories and data input files in the following directory: {0}. Please go into these folders and create your data files for your Farm. Please hit enter to exit the application.

data.name: Message_InvalidCoordinateEntered
data.value: An invalid coordinate was entered. Please check the latitude and longitude values and try again.

data.name: Message_MonthlyBarnTemperatureBreakdownHeader
data.value: Indoor temperatures for dairy barns on the farm

data.name: Message_MonthlyTemperatureBreakdownHeader
data.value: The monthly temperature averages for the farm.

data.name: Message_RowDeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete row(s)?

data.name: Prompt_ForFarmsFolderLocation
data.value: Please enter the location of your "Farms" folder to run the Holos Command Line Interface

data.name: Prompt_SelectPolygonOptions
data.value: Please select one of the options below to continue processing

data.name: Prompt_ToEnterPolygonID
data.value: Please enter your Farm location ID (Polygon ID)

data.name: Prompt_UserForLanguage
data.value: Please enter the number corresponding to your preferred language (English = 1, French = 2)

data.name: Prompt_UserForPolygonSelection
data.value: In order to process the data for your Farm, the Holos Command Line Interface needs to know the location of your Farm to produce results. If you do not know your location of your Farm, please run Holos and determine the location by selecting your geographical area in the 'Setting Your Farm Location' section. The Farm that does not have a settings file is: {0}

data.name: Prompt_UserForUnitsOfMeasurement
data.value: Please enter the number corresponding to your preferred units of measurement (Metric = 1, Imperial = 2)

data.name: Prompt_UserToUsePreviousDirectory
data.value: The previously entered directory containing your farms is: {0} Would you like to continue using this directory?

data.name: Settings_EmissionFactorForLeachingAndRunOff
data.value: Emission Factor For Leaching And Runoff

data.name: Settings_FractionOfNLostByVolatilization
data.value: Fraction Of N Lost By Volatilization

data.name: Settings_MoistureResponseFunctionAtWiltingPoint
data.value: Moisture Response Function At Wilting Point

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductReturnedToSoilForAnnuals
data.value: Percentage Of Product Returned To Soil For Annuals

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductReturnedToSoilForFodderCorn
data.value: Percentage Of Product Returned To Soil For Fodder Corn

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductReturnedToSoilForPerennials
data.value: Percentage Of Product Returned To Soil For Perennials

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductReturnedToSoilForRangelandDueToHarvestLoss
data.value: Percentage Of Product Returned To Soil For Rangeland Due To Harvest Loss

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductReturnedToSoilForRootCrops
data.value: Percentage Of Product Returned To Soil For Root Crops

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductYieldReturnedToSoilForCoverCrops
data.value: Percentage Of Product Yield Returned To Soil For Cover Crops

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductYieldReturnedToSoilForCoverCropsForage
data.value: Percentage Of Product Yield Returned To Soil For Cover Crops Forage

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductYieldReturnedToSoilForCoverCropsProduce
data.value: Percentage Of Product Yield Returned To Soil For Cover Crops Produce

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfProductYieldReturnedToSoilForSilageCrops
data.value: Percentage Of Product Yield Returned To Soil For Silage Crops

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfRootsReturnedToSoilForAnnuals
data.value: Percentage Of Roots Returned To Soil For Annuals

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfRootsReturnedToSoilForCoverCrops
data.value: Percentage Of Roots Returned To Soil For Cover Crops

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfRootsReturnedToSoilForFodderCorn
data.value: Percentage Of Roots Returned To Soil For Fodder Corn

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfRootsReturnedToSoilForPerennials
data.value: Percentage Of Roots Returned To Soil For Perennials

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfRootsReturnedToSoilForRangeland
data.value: Percentage Of Roots Returned To Soil For Rangeland

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfRootsReturnedToSoilForSilageCrops
data.value: Percentage Of Roots Returned To Soil For Silage Crops

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfStrawReturnedToSoilForAnnuals
data.value: Percentage Of Straw Returned To Soil For Annuals

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfStrawReturnedToSoilForCoverCrops
data.value: Percentage Of Straw Returned To Soil For Cover Crops

data.name: Settings_PercentageOfStrawReturnedToSoilForRootCrops
data.value: Percentage Of Straw Returned To Soil For Root Crops

data.name: Settings_UseClimateParameterInsteadOfManagementFactor
data.value: Use climate parameter instead of management factor

data.name: Status_AreExportedFarmsInDirectory
data.value: Are your exported farms in your current farms directory?

data.name: Status_CreatingDefaultLethbridgeGeographicData
data.value: The Holos Command Line Interface is creating a default settings file with the Farm location set to the following location: Lethbridge, Alberta. The settings file can be found in this location: {0}. Please refer to this location when you modify the settings file to match your Farm's location data

data.name: Status_FileHasBeenParsed
data.value: The following file has been parsed: {0}.

data.name: Status_InputFilesCreated
data.value: {0} total component input files have been created for your imported farms.

data.name: Status_ProcessingComplete
data.value: Processing complete, press enter to exit the application.

data.name: Status_SettingsFileWillBeCreatedHere
data.value: The settings file will be created here: {0}

data.name: Status_StartingIndividualComponentProcessing
data.value: Starting the processing of the Components in the following Farm: {0}

data.name: Text_AboutPage
data.value: This application is a tool that provides users with access to climate and soil data for agricultural purposes. It is based on Holos, a tool developed by Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada to estimate greenhouse gas emissions from different farming practices. The application uses the NASA Power API to retrieve climate data for any location and time period, such as daily precipitation and evapotranspiration. The application also allows users to extract soil based data from Holos, such as soil group, soil texture, percent organic matter in soil, etc. The aim of this application is to allow users easy access to various soil and climate data without relying on the full Holos application.

data.name: Text_OptionSoilN2OBreakdown
data.value: The monthly emissions distribution for the year. This distribution can be adjusted based on your farm's results. Please note that the addition of all montly percentages

data.name: Text_OptionSoilView
data.value: The Soil tab can be used to change the soil properties for the entire farm. The default values are shown for the current soil type. The soil for the farm can be customized by changing individual soil properties. In order to change the soil type for the specific field only, go to the specific field and select 'soil' tab within the field.

data.name: Text_SaveAs
data.value: Create a copy of the current farm with a new name.

data.name: Text_SaveHolos
data.value: Save changes made to the current farm.

data.name: Text_SoilDataViewAddressSearchDisclaimer
data.value: Road search will acquire the approximate location of the farm, once found, navigate on the map and right-click the exact location of the farm.

data.name: Text_SoilDataViewStepOneDesc
data.value: Select the province in which the farm is located.

data.name: Text_SoilDataViewStepThreeDesc
data.value: Once you've entered your location, click below to retrieve soil data.

data.name: Text_SoilDataViewStepTwoDesc
data.value: Right-click on the map, or enter coordinates to set farms location.

data.name: Label_ShowAdvancedOptions
data.comment: GUI - advanced options toggle title used across all component views

data.name: Label_ShowAdvancedOptionsFieldDesc
data.value: Display additional configuration options for detailed field management across all steps
data.comment: GUI - advanced options toggle description for the Field component

data.name: Label_ShowAdvancedOptionsRotationDesc
data.value: Display additional configuration options for detailed crop rotation management
data.comment: GUI - advanced options toggle description for the Rotation component

data.name: Label_FieldSize
data.value: Select a field size to be used for all fields in this rotation:
data.comment: GUI - Field component Step 1 input label

data.name: Label_Advanced
data.comment: GUI - badge shown on advanced-only cards

data.name: Label_DefineRotationParameters
data.value: Set Up Your Rotation Period and Fields

data.name: Label_ConfigureTimePeriodAndFieldSetup
data.value: Configure the time period and field setup for this rotation

data.name: Label_RotationSummary
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 1 advanced card header

data.name: Label_CalculatedTotalsForThisRotation
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 1 advanced card sub-header

data.name: Label_AddCropsToRotationDesc
data.value: Add crops to create your rotation timeline. Each crop represents one year in the sequence. The actual year each crop is grown depends on the field and its starting position in the rotation.

data.name: Button_AddCrop
data.comment: GUI - button to add a crop to the rotation timeline

data.name: Label_CropsInSequence
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 2 crops count label

data.name: Label_RotationTimeline
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 2 timeline panel header

data.name: Label_SelectCrop
data.comment: GUI - label above the crop type ComboBox in a timeline card

data.name: Label_TimelineScrollHint
data.value: Tip: Scroll horizontally to view all crops, selected crop will be highlighted
data.comment: GUI - hint text below the timeline

data.name: Label_AddAtLeastOneCrop
data.value: Add at least one crop to create your rotation

data.name: Label_RotationShiftDirection
data.comment: GUI - Rotation field config advanced section label

data.name: Label_ReviewHowCropsDistributed
data.value: Review how crops will be distributed across fields over time. Each row represents a field, each column represents a year. Click a crop card to edit its properties.

data.name: Label_PreviewRequireFields
data.value: Configure the number of fields in Step 1

data.name: Label_PreviewRequireCrops
data.value: Add at least one crop in Step 2

data.name: Label_RotationShiftingDesc
data.value: Each field will grow a different sequence of crops, starting at different points in the rotation. This diversifies operational risk and distributes workload across the growing season.

data.name: Label_NextStepPreviewDesc
data.value: Click any cell in the preview grid to edit crop-specific details (yield, irrigation, etc.) for that field and year.

data.name: Label_EditCropDetailsDesc
data.value: Configure yield and irrigation for each crop in your rotation. Click a cell in the preview grid above to edit its details. Select the categories relevant to your operation. Only active categories show input fields below.

data.name: Label_CurrentlyEditing
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 editing indicator label

data.name: Label_CropDetails
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 crop editing section header

data.name: Label_ConfigureYieldForSelected
data.value: Configure yield and irrigation for the selected crop
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 crop editing section sub-header

data.name: Label_CopyToSimilarCrops
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 copy toggle label

data.name: Label_CopyToSimilarCropsDesc
data.value: When enabled, changes you make to yield, irrigation, and herbicide will be automatically copied to all other cells in this field (row) that have the same crop type.
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 copy toggle description

data.name: Label_CopyEnabled
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 toggle ON content

data.name: Label_CopyDisabled
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 toggle OFF content

data.name: Label_YieldWetWeight
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 / Field crop editing label

data.name: Label_AmountOfIrrigation
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 / Field crop editing label

data.name: Label_HerbicideUsed
data.comment: GUI - Rotation Step 4 / Field crop editing label

data.name: Label_ClickCellToEditDetails
data.value: Click a cell in the preview grid (Step 3) to edit its details

data.name: Label_EnterBasicInfoForField
data.value: Enter basic information for this field

data.name: Label_ConfigureAreaAndTimePeriod
data.value: Configure the area and time period for this field

data.name: Button_AddCropToField
data.comment: GUI - Field Step 2 add crop button

data.name: Label_FieldHistoryTimeline
data.comment: GUI - Field Step 2 timeline panel header

data.name: Label_DefineManagementPractices
data.value: Define management practices for your selected crop

data.name: Label_ConfigureBasicCropParameters
data.value: Configure basic crop parameters including yield and irrigation
data.comment: GUI - Field Step 3 General card sub-header

data.name: Label_SetBiomassCoefficients
data.value: Set biomass coefficients for different crop components
data.comment: GUI - Field Step 3 Residues card sub-header

data.name: Label_ConfigureFertilizerSettings
data.value: Configure fertilizer application settings and schedules
data.comment: GUI - Field Step 3 Fertilizer card sub-header

data.name: Label_FertilizerConfiguration
data.comment: GUI - Field Step 3 Fertilizer placeholder header

data.name: Label_FertilizerComingSoon
data.value: This section will be implemented in a future update
data.comment: GUI - Field Step 3 Fertilizer placeholder message

data.name: Label_Fields
data.value: How many fields are in this rotation?
data.comment: GUI - label for number-of-fields input and summary

data.name: Label_Field
data.comment: GUI - label for a single field (e.g., Currently editing indicator)

data.name: Label_ShowAdvancedOptionsDairyDesc
data.value: Display additional configuration options for detailed dairy operation management
data.comment: GUI - DairyComponentView advanced options expander description

data.name: Label_Practice
data.comment: GUI - Dairy stage view practice selector label

data.name: Button_AddPractice
data.comment: GUI - Dairy stage view add-practice button

data.name: Label_NoPracticesDefined
data.value: No management practices defined. Click '+ Add' to create one.

data.name: Label_MaintenanceCoefficient

data.name: Label_KgKg

data.name: Label_ManagementPracticesCalfStageDesc
data.value: Configure management practices for calf stage (birth to 4 months)

data.name: Label_ManagementPracticesHeiferStageDesc
data.value: Configure management practices for heifer stage (4 months to first calving)

data.name: Label_ManagementPracticesLactatingStageDesc
data.value: Configure management practices for lactating cow stage (active milk production)

data.name: Label_ManagementPracticesDryStageDesc
data.value: Configure management practices for dry cow stage (pre-calving period)

data.name: Label_YouHaveMultipleGroupsDesc
data.value: You have multiple groups. Select which group's management practices you want to configure:

data.name: Label_AnimalsUnit
data.comment: GUI - inline Run unit label with leading space: " animals"

data.name: Label_NoGroupsGoToStep2
data.value: You haven't added any groups yet. Go back to Step 2 above and click 'Add New Group' to create groups before configuring management practices.
data.comment: GUI - LifecycleConfigurationView no-groups body text (replaces multi-Run bold formatting)

data.name: Label_PleaseSelectGroupFromDropdown
data.value: Please select a group from the dropdown above to configure its management practices.

data.name: Label_ManagementPracticesConfiguration
data.comment: GUI - LifecycleConfigurationView default (no stage selected) panel title

data.name: Label_ClickStageCardAboveDesc
data.value: Click a stage card above to configure management practices

data.name: Label_SelectAStageToBegin
data.comment: GUI - LifecycleConfigurationView default panel inner heading

data.name: Label_ClickOnStageCardDesc1
data.value: Click on one of the stage cards above (Calf, Heifer, Lactating, or Dry)
data.comment: GUI - LifecycleConfigurationView default panel instruction line 1

data.name: Label_ClickOnStageCardDesc2
data.value: to configure its specific management practices and production parameters.
data.comment: GUI - LifecycleConfigurationView default panel instruction line 2

data.name: Label_ClickStageCardBelowDesc
data.value: Click on a stage card below to configure its population, duration, and management practices

data.name: Label_Calf
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Calf stage card title

data.name: Label_DaysUnit
data.comment: GUI - inline Run unit label with leading space: " days"

data.name: Label_Heifer
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Heifer stage card title

data.name: Label_Lactating
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Lactating stage card title

data.name: Label_Dry
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Dry stage card title

data.name: Label_Animals
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Total card standalone unit (no leading space)

data.name: Label_EnterSteadyStatePopDesc
data.value: Enter the steady-state population and duration for the selected stage

data.name: Label_HowManyAnimalGroups
data.value: How many animal groups would you like to create?

data.name: Label_ASingleAnimalGroup
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView simple mode radio button

data.name: Label_MultipleGroups
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode radio button

data.name: Label_HowLongCalvesRemain
data.value: How long do calves remain in this stage?
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Calf stage duration question

data.name: Label_Days
data.comment: GUI - unit label: days (standalone, no leading space)

data.name: Label_HowManyCalvesInHerd
data.value: How many calves are in the herd?

data.name: Label_Head
data.comment: GUI - unit label: head (number of animals)

data.name: Label_AnimalGroupsHeader
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode groups section heading (with colon)

data.name: Label_MultipleGroupsExplanation
data.value: You can add multiple groups to represent different animal cohorts with unique management practices. In Step 3, you'll select which group to configure management practices for (diet, housing, etc.).
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode explanation text

data.name: Label_EnterGroupNameDesc
data.value: Enter a descriptive name for each group and specify the number of animals in that group.
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode group list instruction

data.name: Label_GroupName
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode group list header col 1

data.name: Label_AnimalsColumn
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode group list header col 2

data.name: Label_Actions
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode group list header col 3

data.name: Tooltip_RemoveGroup
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView group delete button tooltip

data.name: Button_AddNewGroup
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView advanced mode add group button

data.name: Label_HowLongHeifersRemain
data.value: How long do heifers remain in this stage?
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Heifer stage duration question

data.name: Label_HowManyHeifersInHerd
data.value: How many heifers are in the herd?

data.name: Label_HowLongLactationPeriod
data.value: How long is the lactation period?
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Lactating stage duration question

data.name: Label_HowManyLactatingCowsInHerd
data.value: How many lactating cows are in the herd?

data.name: Label_HowLongDryPeriod
data.value: How long is the dry period?
data.comment: GUI - CalculatedHerdCompositionView Dry stage duration question

data.name: Label_HowManyDryCowsInHerd
data.value: How many dry cows are in the herd?

data.name: Label_TipScrollHorizontally
data.value: Tip: Scroll horizontally to view all groups, click on a group to select it

data.name: Label_SelectCategoryToBrowse
data.value: Select a category to browse available components

data.name: Label_ComponentsAvailable
data.comment: GUI - ChooseComponentsView category card component count suffix

data.name: Label_BackToCategories
data.comment: GUI - ChooseComponentsView back navigation button text

data.name: Button_AddToFarm
data.comment: GUI - ChooseComponentsView component card add button

data.name: Label_ClickEditComponentsDesc
data.value: Click 'Edit Components' below to add components to your farm

data.name: Label_TipStartWithFieldOrLivestock
data.value: Tip: Start with field or livestock components

data.name: Label_MonthlyPrecipitationAveragesDesc
data.value: The monthly precipitation averages for the farm.

data.name: Label_ExportManureDesc
data.value: Manure produced by animals on this farm can be exported off-site. To export manure from this farm, click the 'Create Manure Export' button and specify the amount exported

data.name: Label_TotalManureProducedForAnimalType
data.value: Total manure produced on farm for animal type:

data.name: Label_SearchIngredientsByIFN
data.value: Search by ingredient name or IFN...

data.name: AutomationName_CanadaLogo
data.value: Government of Canada – Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada logo

data.name: Label_DairyCattleLifecycleDesc
data.value: Understanding the journey from birth to productive milking cow

data.name: Label_PoultryProductionChainDesc
data.value: How poultry components connect in the breeding-to-production pipeline

data.name: Label_BreederSubtitle
data.value: Parent breeding stock producing fertilized eggs

data.name: Label_HatcherySubtitle
data.value: Incubation of fertilized eggs into day-old chicks

data.name: Label_EggSubtitle
data.value: Layer hens producing table eggs (19-72 weeks)

data.name: Label_ChickenMeatSubtitle
data.value: Broilers raised to market weight (5-7 weeks)

data.name: Label_TurkeyBreederSubtitle
data.value: Parent stock producing fertilized turkey eggs

data.name: Label_TurkeyMeatSubtitle
data.value: Turkeys raised to market weight (10-20 weeks)

data.name: Label_KgDmPerHa
data.comment: GUI - unit label for dry matter yield

data.name: Label_KgNPerHa
data.comment: GUI - unit label for nitrogen rate

data.name: Label_KgPPerHa
data.comment: GUI - unit label for phosphorus rate

data.name: Label_KgKPerHa
data.comment: GUI - unit label for potassium rate

data.name: Label_KgSPerHa
data.comment: GUI - unit label for sulphur rate

data.name: Label_BiomassCoefficients
data.comment: GUI - Crop Residue tab section header

data.name: Label_PercentageReturnedToSoil
data.comment: GUI - Crop Residue tab section header

data.name: Label_NitrogenContent
data.comment: GUI - Crop Residue tab section header

data.name: Label_CarbonAndLignin
data.comment: GUI - Crop Residue tab section header

data.name: Message_ManagementPeriodTableIntro
data.value: Each row in the table below represents one management period for the '{0}' animal group. Use the buttons below to add or remove periods.
data.comment: GUI - OtherAnimalsStep2 instruction panel intro sentence; {0} = selected group name

data.name: Message_ManagementPeriodTipName
data.value: • Name: Give each period a descriptive name that reflects the management context (e.g. "Winter Housing", "Summer Pasture 2024").

data.name: Message_ManagementPeriodTipDates
data.value: • Start & End Date: Use the calendar pickers to set when each period begins and ends — this defines how long the period lasts.

data.name: Message_ManagementPeriodTipDays
data.value: • Number of Days: Calculated automatically from the start and end dates, but can be adjusted directly if needed.

data.name: Message_ManagementPeriodTipAnimals
data.value: • Number of Animals: Enter the size of this animal group during each period.
